title: 'buildah config --cmd "--help" fails.
body:
@ipbabble reports that the command:

```
# buildah config --cmd "--help" $bldah
option --cmd requires a value
```
This should succeed.

comments.body:
@ipbabble looks to be a cli param parsing issue.  I'm not sure we can fix it, but I think this works.  Can you try?

buildah config --cmd "\-\-help" $ctr

Ugh, md messed up my formating.  How's about:

```
buildah config --cmd "\-\-help" $ctr
```
a backslash \ before each dash in help

I'm not having as good of luck with it...  Reopening, but #520 fixes this.

```
# buildah config --author="Jane Austen" --cmd="--help" alpine-working-container
option --cmd requires a value
# buildah config --author="Jane Austen" --cmd "--help" alpine-working-container
option --cmd requires a value
# buildah config --cmd "--help" alpine-working-container
option --cmd requires a value
# buildah config --cmd="--help" alpine-working-container
option --cmd requires a value
```
